mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.fact_settlements ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, supplier_id, order_id, state_id, flow_id, order_amount, commission_amount, platform_fee, net_amount, currency, settlement_period_start, settlement_period_end, disbursement_reference, created_time ) SELECT s.id, s.tenant, NOW(), s.supplier_id, s.order_id, s.state_id, s.flow_id, COALESCE(s.order_amount, 0), COALESCE(s.commission_amount, 0), COALESCE(s.platform_fee, 0), COALESCE(s.net_amount, 0), COALESCE(s.currency, 'INR'), s.settlement_period_start, s.settlement_period_end, s.disbursement_reference, s.created_time FROM hm_settlement.settlements s
mapper.update: INSERT INTO hm_query.dim_seller (seller_id, seller_name, seller_tier, last_synced_at) SELECT sup.id, COALESCE(sup.business_name, ''), COALESCE(sup.tier, ''), NOW() FROM hm_supplier.supplier sup WHERE sup.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT supplier_id FROM hm_settlement.settlements WHERE supplier_id IS NOT NULL) ON CONFLICT (seller_id) DO UPDATE SET seller_name = EXCLUDED.seller_name, seller_tier = EXCLUDED.seller_tier, last_synced_at = EXCLUDED.last_synced_at
